# VIPACH for Business

Canonical site: https://business.vipach.at/

VIPACH for Business is the business direction founded by Norbert Banhalmi. Norbert Banhalmi is primarily a photographer and visual positioning specialist: Executive Portraiture • Visual Branding Strategist • Helping leaders build a powerful professional presence. Digital entity building is handled by the VIPACH for Business team.

Core positioning:
- Norbert Banhalmi: photographer, executive portraiture, visual branding, visual positioning, professional presence.
- VIPACH for Business team: digital entity audit, strategic diagnosis, visual asset management, structured data and AI-readable brand architecture.
- Market focus: Hungarian companies, founders and brands entering Austria, Germany, Switzerland, the wider DACH region and the US market.
- Business context: official member of AmCham Austria; connected to the official WKO / Vienna Chamber of Commerce environment.
- This indicates DACH and transatlantic business-community and chamber presence, not endorsement, partner status or certification.

Entity map:
- Person: Norbert Banhalmi / Bánhalmi Norbert — Wikidata Q56391118.
- Legal provider: Bánhalmi Norbert e.U. — Wikidata Q138425941, UID/VAT ATU80445314.
- Business direction: VIPACH for Business — founded by Norbert Banhalmi, execution by the VIPACH for Business team.
- Related creative background: VIPACH | Vienna Photo Art & Creative HUB — Wikidata Q138416887. Not identical to VIPACH for Business.
- Vienna office: Wikidata Q138426506, Schwedenplatz 2 / Laurenzerberg 5/I/8-9, 1010 Wien, Austria, phone +43 677 616 555 92.
- Budapest office: Wikidata Q138830452, Lágymányosi u. 15, 1111 Budapest, Hungary, phone +36 70 469 83 97.

Important boundaries:
- VIPACH for Business is not a political campaign service.
- Public case studies are presented as visual asset management and structured digital presence examples, not endorsements.
- The website does not guarantee business results, search rankings, AI recommendations or company value growth.

Contact:
- Shared email: office@vipach.at
- Vienna: +43 677 616 555 92
- Budapest: +36 70 469 83 97

Technology:
- Static hosting: GitHub Pages.
- Form relay: Google Apps Script / Google Workspace.
- The form includes explicit GDPR consent in HU, EN and DE.
- Preferred terminology: digital ecosystem / understandable digital ecosystem. Avoid using “digital ecosystem” where it could imply ownership interests, subsidiaries or corporate holdings.
- LinkedIn profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/norbertbanhalmi/
